- In the U.S., the expansion of colocation data centers is accelerating the demand for data center rack power distribution unit market.
- By rack type, non-intelligent segment held the largest revenue share in 2025.

## Data Center Rack PDU Market Synopsis

Data Center Rack PDU Market Size Was Valued at USD 1.98 Billion in 2024, and is Projected to Reach USD 4.18 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 9.8% From 2025-2032.

A data center rack PDU is an electrical apparatus which is used to supply power to several electrical appliances in the server room or a data center. Some of the devices that may be connected to the power distribution unit PDU are the network switches and servers and other forms of electronics. The purpose of using a power distribution unit (PDU) is to ensure that there is constant, reliable distribution of electrical power to all equipment in the rack, guaranteeing that each piece of equipment receives only the amount of power necessary for it to run efficiently.

Global Intelligent PDU Market to Reach US$3.2 Billion by 2030

### DATA CENTER PDU MARKET SIZE, SHARE & TRENDS

According to Marketsandmarkets, the data center PDU market size was valued USD 3.94 biliion in 2025 and is project to reach USD 14.23 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 19.5% from 2026 to 2032. The data center PDU market is driven by the expansion of hyperscale and AI-driven data centers, the increasing rack power density, and the rising adoption of intelligent PDUs for real-time monitoring and operational efficiency. Additionally, the strong focus on energy efficiency, sustainability, and reliable power distribution infrastructure is further supporting the demand for advanced PDU solutions across modern data center environments.

DUBLIN, Feb. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The"Intelligent PDU: Global Strategic Business Report" report has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.

The global market for Intelligent PDU estimated at US$1.7 Billion in the year 2022, is projected to reach a revised size of US$2.9 Billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 7% over the analysis period 2022-2030.

Metered, one of the segments analyzed in the report, is projected to record a 7.4% CAGR and reach US$949.7 Million by the end of the analysis period.

Taking into account the ongoing post pandemic recovery, growth in the Monitored segment is readjusted to a revised 6.7% CAGR for the next 8-year period. China, the world's second largest economy, is forecast to reach a projected market size of US$498.2 Million by the year 2030 trailing a CAGR of 6.6% over the analysis period 2022 to 2030.
